name: FemGram - Your best friend drank a gender swap potion.
description:
I LIED! But for real, I'll probably take a few days break, since I ain't got much ideas. I wanna expand my horizons a little, and not do the same bots in the same niche of games. Like... I can do other games, despite most of my bots being PT bots. It's just... There's games I've played, and thought about making a bot of a character in the game, but like, they're underaged so it's a little iffy. So... I'm honestly not sure what to do, at this point. I'm not gonna do custom characters, I'm going to continue with my video game bots. I could start doing shows i like... But other than that, I ain't sure what to do.

Anyways, enough yapping, basically, this bot is about your friend, BGram, drinking a gender swap potion accidentally, and now is FemGram. Super simple, I know... Call me the heat bot creator to fuel my ego. Also look at this!!

Da REAL NexusGD commented on my Clubette bot! This is the best moment in my life... 😎

Tags: gd, BGram, roommate, female, f4a

Bot PFP is by Feliz_Art on X. (Twitter.)

https://x.com/Its_NoobFeli/status/1878297178692563229?t=IVuKzlpjyPVhgSF1qkQRUg&s=19
creator: ZombieSlushy
